### Classes

* [`knot`](#knot): Knot DNS server module

* [`knot::file`](#knot--file): Define a file resource for a Knot zone file

* [`Knot::Log_target`](#Knot--Log_target): Define a log target in Knot DNS

* [`Knot::Server`](#Knot--Server): Define a server in Knot DNS

##### <a name="-knot--knotc_bin"></a>`knotc_bin`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

Path to knotc binary

Default value: `'/usr/sbin/knotc'`

##### <a name="-knot--default_tsig_name"></a>`default_tsig_name`

Data type: `String`

Default TSIG key name

Default value: `'NOKEY'`

##### <a name="-knot--default_masters"></a>`default_masters`

Data type: `Array[String]`

Default masters

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-knot--default_provide_xfrs"></a>`default_provide_xfrs`

Data type: `Array[String]`

Default provide-xfrs

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-knot--enable"></a>`enable`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable the service

Default value: `true`

Data type: `Hash`

TSIG keys

Default value: `{}`

Default value: `{}`

Default value: `{}`

Data type: `String`

Default value: `"${knotc_bin} reload || ${knotc_bin} conf-check && service knot restart"`

## Defined types

### <a name="knot--file"></a>`knot::file`

Define a file resource for a Knot zone file

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `knot::file` defined type:

* [`ensure`](#-knot--file--ensure)
* [`owner`](#-knot--file--owner)
* [`group`](#-knot--file--group)
* [`mode`](#-knot--file--mode)
* [`origin`](#-knot--file--origin)
* [`source`](#-knot--file--source)
* [`content`](#-knot--file--content)
* [`content_template`](#-knot--file--content_template)

##### <a name="-knot--file--ensure"></a>`ensure`

Data type: `String`

Whether the file should be present or absent

Default value: `'present'`

##### <a name="-knot--file--owner"></a>`owner`

Data type: `String`

The owner of the file

Default value: `'knot'`

##### <a name="-knot--file--group"></a>`group`

Data type: `String`

The group of the file

Default value: `'knot'`

##### <a name="-knot--file--mode"></a>`mode`

Data type: `Pattern[/^\d+$/]`

The mode of the file

Default value: `'0640'`

##### <a name="-knot--file--origin"></a>`origin`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The origin of the zone file

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--file--source"></a>`source`

Data type: `Optional[Stdlib::Filesource]`

The source of the file

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--file--content"></a>`content`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

The content of the file

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--file--content_template"></a>`content_template`

Data type: `Optional[String[1]]`

The template to use for the content of the file

Default value: `undef`

### <a name="knot--remote"></a>`knot::remote`

Define a remote server for knot

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `knot::remote` defined type:

* [`address4`](#-knot--remote--address4)
* [`address6`](#-knot--remote--address6)
* [`tsig`](#-knot--remote--tsig)
* [`tsig_name`](#-knot--remote--tsig_name)
* [`port`](#-knot--remote--port)

##### <a name="-knot--remote--address4"></a>`address4`

Data type: `Optional[Stdlib::IP::Address::V4]`

The IPv4 address of the remote server

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--remote--address6"></a>`address6`

Data type: `Optional[Stdlib::IP::Address::V6]`

The IPv6 address of the remote server

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--remote--tsig"></a>`tsig`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The name of the TSIG key to use

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--remote--tsig_name"></a>`tsig_name`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The name of the TSIG key to use

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--remote--port"></a>`port`

Data type: `Stdlib::Port`

The port to use for the remote server

Default value: `53`

### <a name="knot--tsig"></a>`knot::tsig`

Define a TSIG key for knot

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `knot::tsig` defined type:

* [`algo`](#-knot--tsig--algo)
* [`data`](#-knot--tsig--data)
* [`key_name`](#-knot--tsig--key_name)

##### <a name="-knot--tsig--algo"></a>`algo`

Data type: `Knot::Algo`

The algorithm to use for the key

Default value: `'hmac-sha256'`

##### <a name="-knot--tsig--data"></a>`data`

Data type: `Stdlib::Base64`

The data for the key

##### <a name="-knot--tsig--key_name"></a>`key_name`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The name of the key

Default value: `undef`

The following parameters are available in the `knot::zone` defined type:

* [`zonemd_generate`](#-knot--zone--zonemd_generate)
* [`allow_axfr_fallback`](#-knot--zone--allow_axfr_fallback)
* [`create_ixfr`](#-knot--zone--create_ixfr)
* [`ixfr_size`](#-knot--zone--ixfr_size)

* [`expire_max_interval`](#-knot--zone--expire_max_interval)

##### <a name="-knot--zone--masters"></a>`masters`

Data type: `Array[String]`

An array of master servers for the zone

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--provide_xfrs"></a>`provide_xfrs`

Data type: `Array[String]`

An array of servers to provide zone transfers to

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--allow_notify_additions"></a>`allow_notify_additions`

Data type: `Array[String]`

An array of servers to allow zone transfers from

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--send_notify_additions"></a>`send_notify_additions`

Data type: `Array[String]`

An array of servers to send notifications to

Default value: `[]`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--zonefile"></a>`zonefile`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The path to the zone file

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--zone_dir"></a>`zone_dir`

Data type: `Optional[Stdlib::Unixpath]`

The directory to store the zone file in

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--zonemd_verify"></a>`zonemd_verify`

Data type: `Optional[Knot::On_off]`

Whether to verify the zonemd record

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--zonemd_generate"></a>`zonemd_generate`

Data type: `Optional[Knot::Zonemd_generate]`

Whether to generate the zonemd record

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--allow_axfr_fallback"></a>`allow_axfr_fallback`

Data type: `Optional[Knot::On_off]`

Whether to allow AXFR fallback

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--create_ixfr"></a>`create_ixfr`

Data type: `Optional[Knot::On_off]`

Whether to create IXFR files

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--ixfr_size"></a>`ixfr_size`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

The size of IXFR files

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--refresh_min_interval"></a>`refresh_min_interval`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Minimum refresh interval

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--refresh_max_interval"></a>`refresh_max_interval`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Maximum refresh interval

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--retry_min_interval"></a>`retry_min_interval`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Minimum retry interval

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--retry_max_interval"></a>`retry_max_interval`

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-knot--zone--expire_max_interval"></a>`expire_max_interval`

## Functions

### <a name="knot--get_exported_titles"></a>`knot::get_exported_titles`

Type: Ruby 4.x API

https://github.com/dalen/puppet-puppetdbquery/blob/master/lib/puppetdb/connection.rb

#### `knot::get_exported_titles(Array $imports)`

https://github.com/dalen/puppet-puppetdbquery/blob/master/lib/puppetdb/connection.rb

Returns: `Array` Array of exported titles

##### `imports`

Data type: `Array`

Array of import tags

## Data types

### <a name="Knot--Algo"></a>`Knot::Algo`

Define a zone in Knot DNS

Alias of `Enum[hmac-sha1, hmac-sha224, hmac-sha256, hmac-sha384, hmac-sha512, hmac-md5]`

### <a name="Knot--Log_level"></a>`Knot::Log_level`

Define a log level in Knot DNS

Alias of `Enum[critical, error, warning, notice, info, debug]`

### <a name="Knot--Log_target"></a>`Knot::Log_target`

Define a log target in Knot DNS

Alias of `Enum[stdout, stderr, syslog]`

### <a name="Knot--On_off"></a>`Knot::On_off`

type to define on/off values

Alias of `Enum[on, off]`

### <a name="Knot--Server"></a>`Knot::Server`

Define a server in Knot DNS

Alias of

```puppet
Struct[{
    address4          => Optional[Variant[Tea::Ipv4, Tea::Ipv4_cidr]],
    address6          => Optional[Variant[Tea::Ipv6, Tea::Ipv6_cidr]],
    fetch_tsig_name   => Optional[String],
    provide_tsig_name => Optional[String],
}]
```

### <a name="Knot--Zonemd_generate"></a>`Knot::Zonemd_generate`

Define a zonemd_generate in Knot DNS

Alias of `Enum[none, zonemd-sha384, zonemd-sha512, remove]`
